title: How Gong Built a $7B+ Company in the Age of Vibe Coding | Amit Bendov
summary: Amit Bendov, CEO of Gong, argues that code alone does not create lasting software advantage. Real moats come from customer context, proprietary data, product experience, and operational scale. He contends that fears of AI destroying SaaS companies are exaggerated and that the best AI products build deep customer loyalty through raving fan experiences.
writeup: Gong CEO Amit Bendov makes the case that code is not a durable competitive advantage as AI lowers the cost of building software. His argument: real moats come from customer context, proprietary data, product experience, and operational scale, not from the code itself. He counters the view that AI will destroy SaaS companies, calling those fears exaggerated, and holds that the strongest AI products win through deep customer loyalty and raving fan experiences.
